evals.name: english-mas-regulatory
evals.prompt: Translate this article to Russian. Input: {"title": "MAS issues new licensing framework for stablecoin issuers", "body": "The Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) today announced a new regulatory framework for stablecoin issuers operating in Singapore. Under the new rules, issuers must maintain 100% reserves in low-risk assets and undergo monthly audits.", "source_language": "en"}
evals.expected_output: JSON с title_ru и body_ru на русском, использующим устоявшиеся термины: 'MAS', 'Денежно-кредитное управление Сингапура', 'стейблкоин', 'эмитент', 'резервы'
assertions: title_ru and body_ru are present and non-empty
title_ru and body_ru are in Russian (predominantly Cyrillic)

evals.name: english-defi-terminology
evals.prompt: Translate this article to Russian. Input: {"title": "Aave launches GHO stablecoin on Ethereum mainnet", "body": "Aave, a leading DeFi protocol, today launched its native overcollateralized stablecoin GHO on Ethereum mainnet. GHO is pegged to the US dollar and backed by a basket of assets supplied to Aave.", "source_language": "en"}
evals.expected_output: Перевод сохраняет терминологию DeFi: 'DeFi', 'стейблкоин', 'сверхобеспеченный' или эквивалент, 'привязан к доллару США'
assertions: body_ru does not contain literal word-by-word translations like 'децентрализованные финансы протокол'

evals.name: edge-case-mixed-language
evals.prompt: Translate this article to Russian. Input: {"title": "AFSA выдало MiCA-like лицензию crypto-провайдеру", "body": "AFSA today granted a crypto-license under the AIFC framework to XYZ Crypto Ltd. The license is similar to MiCA standards in the European Union and allows custody and trading services.", "source_language": "en"}
evals.expected_output: Перевод правильно обрабатывает уже частично русский заголовок и полностью переводит английское тело
assertions: title_ru and body_ru are in Russian
